---
title: "test_debug_engine_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\quarantine\test_debug_engine_empire.py"
loc: 77
complexity: 1
logic_score: 4.50
style_score: 3.78
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 2.64
---

## Intent
The `test_debug_engine_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on mock_engine, test_basic_query_processing, test_thesaurus_loading, test_tokenization_output, test_search_results_output. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via mock_engine, test_basic_query_processing, test_thesaurus_loading, test_tokenization_output, test_search_results_output. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 12 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [io](file://io)
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.tools.debug](file://src.tools.debug)

### Exports
- `mock_engine`
- `test_basic_query_processing`
- `test_thesaurus_loading`
- `test_tokenization_output`
- `test_search_results_output`
